briefdescription.para: Flag: Should dx change or nx, with vol?
coords
Cuboid edge.
Cuboid edge.

sect1.title: of entries in z in surround volume
sect1.para: For spherical mesh, coords are xyz r0 r1 theta0 theta1 phi0 phi1 For Cylindrical mesh, coords are x1y1z1 x2y2z2 r0 r1 phi0 phi1 For cuboid mesh, coords are x1y1z1 x2y2z2 For tetrahedral mesh, coords are x1y1z1 x2y2z2 x3y3z3 x4y4z4 Later worry about planar meshes. Those would be surfaces Mesh to Space lookup. Indexed by linear mesh index, from 0 to number of actual mesh entries (occupied cuboids). Returns spatial index, from 0 to nx * ny * nz - 1. Needed whenever the cuboid mesh is not filling the entire volume of the cube, that is, in most cases.

briefdescription.para: Cuboid edge.

sect1.title: of entries in x in surround volume
of entries in y in surround volume

briefdescription.para: Flag: Should the ends loop around mathemagically?

detaileddescription.para: Space to Mesh lookup. Indexed by spatial index, from 0 to nx * ny * nz - 1. Specifically, point x y z is indexed as ( z * ny + y ) * nx + x. Returns mesh index to look up molecules etc in the specific volume. In case the spatial location is outside the included volume of the mesh, returns ~0.
Vector of spatial meshIndices comprising surface of volume in CubeMesh.

briefdescription.para: Flag: should all voxels diffuse to any tgt?
coords
coords
coords
coords
coords

memberdef.argsstring: (vector< pair< unsigned int, unsigned int > > &intersect, double xmin, double xmax, double ymin, double ymax, double zmin, double zmax) const
memberdef.name: assignVoxels

param.type: vector< pair< unsigned int, unsigned int > > &

memberdef.argsstring: (Id geom, double x, double y, double z)
memberdef.name: buildMesh

detaileddescription.para: Sets up the stencil that defines how to combine neighboring mesh elements to set up the diffusion du/dt term, using the method of lines. This is a very general function. It uses the information in the m2s_ and s2m_ vectors to work out the adjacency matrix. So we could use an arbitrary 3-D image to define the diffusive volume and boundaries using m2s_ and s2m_. We could also use geometric shapes through the fillSpaceToMeshLookup() function, which is currently a dummy and just does a cuboid.

briefdescription.para: Return 0 if spacing same, -1 if self smaller, +1 if self bigger.

memberdef.argsstring: (const CubeMesh *other, double &xmin, double &xmax, double &ymin, double &ymax, double &zmin, double &zmax) const
memberdef.name: defineIntersection

briefdescription.para: Defines a cuboid volume of intersection between self and other.

detaileddescription.para: Updates the m2s_ vector after s2m_ has been changed, and rebuilds the Stencil too. Any earlier junction information is lost.
Updates the s2m_ vector after m2s_ has been changed, and rebuilds the Stencil too. Any earlier junction information is lost.

briefdescription.para: Virtual function to return volume of mesh Entry, including.

detaileddescription.para: Utility function to return volume of any voxel including those diffusively coupled and aubtting the present volume.
Fills surface_ vector with spatial meshIndices for a cuboid, that is, puts the surfaces of the cuboid in the vector.

briefdescription.para: Fills surface_ vector with spatial meshIndices for a rectangle.
Virtual function to return coords of mesh Entry.

detaileddescription.para: Virtual function to return coords of mesh Entry. For Cuboid mesh, coords are x1y1z1 x2y2z2

briefdescription.para: Virtual function to return diffusion X-section area.

detaileddescription.para: Virtual function to return diffusion X-section area for each neighbor.

briefdescription.para: Virtual function to return scale factor for diffusion. 1 here.
Virtual function to return dimensions of specified entry.
Virtual function to return volume of mesh Entry.
Virtual function to return MeshType of specified entry.
Inherited virtual, do nothing for now.

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned int index, double &x, double &y, double &z) const
memberdef.name: indexToSpace

briefdescription.para: Converts the integer meshIndex to spatial coords.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Eref &e, double volume, unsigned int numEntries)
memberdef.name: innerBuildDefaultMesh

briefdescription.para: Virtual func to make a mesh with specified Volume and numEntries.

detaileddescription.para: Builds something as close to a cube as can get. This needs a smarter boundary handling code than I have here. For now, goes for the nearest cube
Inherited virtual func. Returns number of MeshEntry in array

memberdef.argsstring: (const Eref &e, unsigned int numNodes, unsigned int numThreads)
memberdef.name: innerHandleNodeInfo

detaileddescription.para: Generate node decomposition of mesh, send it out along meshSplitFinfo msg

memberdef.argsstring: (const Eref &e, const SrcFinfo2< unsigned int, vector< double > > *meshStatsFinfo)
memberdef.name: innerHandleRequestMeshStats

param.type: const SrcFinfo2< unsigned int, vector< double > > *

briefdescription.para: More inherited virtual funcs: request comes in for mesh stats.
Inherited virtual func.

detaileddescription.para: Inherited virtual func. Assigns number of MeshEntries.

memberdef.argsstring: (double x, double y, double z) const
memberdef.name: isInsideCuboid

memberdef.argsstring: (double x, double y, double z) const
memberdef.name: isInsideSpheroid

detaileddescription.para: Dumbed-down version that does mesh matching based only on index. Useful for non-spatial matching and single-voxel systems.
Version that assumes all voxels are in contact and able to diffuse with matching voxels on other mesh
Specialization for cube-to-cube mesh matching. Return vector is of pairs of meshIndices (not spatialIndices).
Key virtual function for generating a map between facing surfaces on a CubeMesh and another ChemCompt

memberdef.argsstring: (double x, double y, double z, unsigned int &index) const
memberdef.name: nearest

detaileddescription.para: Virtual function to return the distance and index of nearest meshEntry. Places entry at centre of voxel.

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned int spaceIndex, int dx, int dy, int dz) const
memberdef.name: neighbor

briefdescription.para: Utility function for returning # of dimensions in mesh.
Assigns diffusion scaling info for the voxel junctions.
Assigns volume info for the voxel junctions.

memberdef.argsstring: (double x, double y, double z) const
memberdef.name: spaceToIndex

briefdescription.para: Converts the 3-D coords to an index. EMPTY if out of range.
Utility and test function to read surface.

detaileddescription.para: Recomputes all local coordinate and meshing data following a change in any of the coord parameters

This assumes that dx, dy, dz are the quantities to preserve, over numEntries. So when the compartment changes volume, so does numEntries. dx, dy, dz do not change, some of the sub-cuboids will partially be outside.

inbodydescription.para: Temporarily fill out the whole cube for m2s and s2m. These

briefdescription.para: Virtual func to get volume of entire compartment.
Virtual func so that derived classes can return voxel midpoint.
Virtual func so that derived classes can pass voxel volume back.
Virtual func, assigns volume, usually to single voxel.

memberdef.name: initCinfo
memberdef.references: OpFunc4< T, A1, A2, A3, A4 >::OpFunc4

detaileddescription.para: The CubeMesh represents a chemically identified compartment shaped like a cuboid. This is not really an effective geometry for most neurons because it would have to be rather finely subdivided to fit a typical dendrite or soma volume, but it is general.
